info.name: TZ-App — RBAC API
info.description:
JWT authentication + role-based access control.

## Setup
1. `cd src && python manage.py migrate && python manage.py seed_data`
2. `python manage.py runserver`
3. Import `postman-variables.json` as an environment and select it.
4. Run **1. Auth > Login (admin)** — it stores the token pair, and every admin-only request below picks it up automatically.

The folders are ordered to be run top-to-bottom in the Collection Runner: each one captures the ids the next needs (role_id, permission_id, demo_user_id...), so nothing has to be pasted by hand.

## Response format
Every response uses one envelope.

Success: `{"success": true, "message": "...", "data": {}}`

Failure: `{"success": false, "message": "...", "errors": {}}`

Tokens therefore live at `data.access` / `data.refresh`, and list pagination at `data.count` / `data.pages` / `data.results`.

Interactive docs: http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/docs/

item.name: 1. Auth
item.description: Регистрация, login, профиль, logout, мягкое удаление.

request.description: Creates a fresh demo account. The pre-request script generates a unique email so the folder can be re-run without a duplicate-email 400.

The seeded administrator (created by `python manage.py seed_data`).
Captures the token pair into {{access_token}} / {{refresh_token}} — every admin-only request in this collection uses them via collection-level auth.
Kept in separate variables so the self-service flow below never clobbers the admin's token.
Проверяет, что после login система идентифицирует пользователя.

Обновление информации: пользователь редактирует свой профиль.

id, is_active and date_joined are read-only — is_active especially, or a soft-deleted user could reactivate themselves.
Blacklists the refresh token. The access token stays valid until it expires — inherent to stateless JWT.
Proves the refresh token really was blacklisted.
Fresh tokens before the soft-delete step below.

Удаление аккаунта (мягкое): is_active=False, все refresh-токены в blacklist.
Строка в базе остается. Returns 200 (not 204) because every response in this API carries the envelope, and HTTP forbids a body on 204.
The same token that worked a moment ago is now rejected: SimpleJWT refuses tokens belonging to an inactive user.

item.name: 2. Roles (admin)
item.description: role.view to read, role.manage to write.

request.description: Requires `role.view`. Paginated — count/pages/results live inside `data`.
Search runs over name and description.
ordering: name | created_at | updated_at, prefix `-` to reverse.
Requires `role.manage`. Names are unique case-insensitively.
Uniqueness is case-insensitive, so this is rejected.
Also removes the role's permission grants and revokes it from every user who held it. Returns 200 with the envelope.

item.name: 3. Permissions (admin)
item.description: permission.view to read, permission.manage to write.

request.description: Requires `permission.view`.
Exact, case-insensitive. Unlike ?search=, which matches loosely.
Everything under `user.*`.
What a given role carries.
Permissions no role grants.
Loose match across code, name and description.
Requires `permission.manage`. Codes are lowercased on write and must be dotted lowercase words — a stored `Report.Export` could never match a `report.export` check.

item.name: 4. Assignment (admin)
item.description: Права пользователю через роли; права роли.

request.description: Requires `role.manage`. Idempotent: assigning a role the user already holds is a no-op reported under `already_assigned`.
Proves idempotency: no duplicate row, no error.
Sets the user's roles to exactly this list. An empty list strips all.
Repeating an id in one payload is a client bug, so it is rejected.

Requires `permission.manage`.

Takes effect immediately: every user holding this role sees it on their very next request — no re-login, no token refresh.
An empty list strips every permission — this restores Guest to its seeded state (Guest holds nothing).
Idempotent: removing what the role does not carry is reported under `not_assigned`, not an error.

item.name: 5. Mock business objects
item.description: Требуют mock.view. Таблиц в БД нет.

request.description: Requires `mock.view`. Static JSON — no database table.

item.description: Демонстрация правил доступа и конверта ошибок.

request.description: Если по входящему запросу не удается определить залогиненного пользователя, выдается ошибка 401.

item.name: Setup - register a user with no roles

request.description: A freshly registered user holds no roles, and therefore no permissions.

Если пользователь определен, но запрашиваемый ресурс ему не доступен — 403 Forbidden.

The account above is authenticated (so not 401) but holds no `role.view` permission.
